klinokinesis.notes: Pirouette-initiation rate is elevated when the worm heads down-gradient (dC/dt < 0); the down/up-gradient turn-rate ratio is ~2x. A dimensionless ratio, so directly comparable to the model statistic. The range is an approximate literature signature, not a pixel digitization of the original figures.

klinotaxis.notes: The weathervane curves the trajectory toward the gradient (positive slope of curving-rate vs bearing). Its magnitude in rad/mm-per-bearing is not directly comparable to the paper's deg/mm-per-normal-gradient parameterization, so this is a sign-only (direction) reference; a figure-digitized slope is an explicit non-goal.

klinokinesis_magnitude.notes: Threshold-free companion to down_up_turn_ratio: mean |dtheta| heading down- vs up-gradient. Same documented direction (larger reorientations down-gradient) but a different unit (turn magnitude, not pirouette rate), so it is graded sign-only; used as a theta_sharp-independent robustness cross-check when the |dtheta| distribution has no natural sharp/gradual cut.

klinotaxis_all.notes: Threshold-free companion to weathervane_slope: the curving-rate-vs-bearing slope over all usable steps (sharp reorientations not excluded), independent of theta_sharp. Sign-only (direction) reference, used as the weathervane robustness cross-check.
